subject: physics
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.30
question_html:
The orbital radius of the Earth around the Sun is 1.5 times that of Venus. What is the intensity of solar radiation at the orbital radius of Venus?

A. 0.6 kW m-2

B. 0.9 kW m-2

C. 2 kW m-2

D. 3 kW m-2
examiners_html: This had a low discrimination index at both SL and HL and although the correct answer was the most popular, all options gained high support. Candidates should be reminded that they have a data booklet and become familiar with its contents before the exam.
